prestazioni: Engine: N63B44O1 (4.4L twin-turbo V8) – Full M Performance Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash by Eurocharged with custom dyno-tuned 12.5:1 compression mapping, ported cylinder heads with Ferrea Competition Series valves (Inconel exhaust), and upgraded Mahle Motorsport forged pistons with Grafal-coated skirts for 650whp on E85 (98%+ purity).

Turbochargers: Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos with billet compressor wheels (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer), custom 0.82 A/R T4 divorced wastegates, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegates with V-band clamps, paired with a CSF Race intercooler (bar-and-plate, 4.5" thick core) and Vibrant 1.5" silicone couplers with T-bolt clamps.

Drivetrain: MFactory 2.17 final drive ratio LSD with carbon fiber clutch plates (Sachs Performance 3-disc setup), 3.91:1 rear differential gears (G2 Axle & Gear), and a Driveshaft Shop 2-piece aluminum driveshaft with CV joints rated for 1,000Nm torque. Transmission: ZF 8HP70 8-speed auto with a Plex Tuning TCU flash for 0.15s shift times, upgraded Meyle HD torque converter, and a BMS transmission cooler with dual 10" SPAL fans.
estetica: Body: Liberty Walk LB Works F10 widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and trunk spoiler) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (20% gloss), paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF 103 20" forged wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear) in Hyper Black finish with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear).

Aero: RK Sport F10-specific front splitter (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) with integrated canards, custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 50mm ground clearance) by APR Performance, and a custom titanium exhaust system by Remus (dual 3.5" outlets, quad tips, valved for backpressure tuning) with Akrapović titanium tips.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Euro-Design (dashboard, door cards, headliner) in Anthracite with red stitching, Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Schroth 6-point harnesses), and a custom MOTEC C127 dash display integrated into the OEM cluster housing, paired with a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom titanium shift knob by 034Motorsport.
